query:
INSERT INTO user_department_roles (userId, departmentId, assignmentType, leaderUserId, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  d.id,
  'LEADER',
  NULL,
  u.status,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users u
JOIN departamentos d ON d.leaderId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW();
